narrative: Currently a Search Engineer at PolicyBazaar with four years of experience, this candidate brings solid product‑company exposure and a deep grasp of search‑focused AI tools. Strong verified skill depth in NLP, scikit‑learn, Learning to Rank, Elasticsearch and Milvus lifted their ranking. Their work on TensorFlow‑based ranking models aligns well with the senior AI/ML role’s focus on retrieval. However, they fall short of the 5‑9 year experience window and are based in Indore, which may affect availability for the Pune/Noida location. Minor trust flags and lower platform engagement also temper their overall fit.
